top_signals.title: David Bailey’s Nakamoto bitcoin treasury announces 1-for-40 reverse split as shares hit new lows
top_signals.summary: Nakamoto’s reverse split will shrink outstanding shares to about 17.4 million from roughly 696 million, following a 99.5% price drop.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: DOJ charges ex-prosecutor with stealing Trump documents case report prepared by Jack Smith
top_signals.summary: Carmen Mercedes Lineberger allegedy emailed herself a copy of Volume II of special counsel Jack Smith's report on Trump's criminal case.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
